_meta.description: Wave 0 backend governance policy for lean, gate-controlled, audit-ready system design before broad frontend expansion.

objective.name: Contract Freeze And Value Justification
objective.statement: No new entity, endpoint, table, schema, or workflow may enter the platform unless it has an explicit operating purpose, KPI linkage, gate-control role, auditability model, and continuous-improvement closure path.

build_questions.question: This element exists to solve which operational control problem?
Which value stream, ISA-95 process family, or regulatory control does it serve?
Which KPI family does it move or protect?
Which entry, process, exit, release, financial, or compliance gate does it control?
What evidence, authority check, and audit trail does it create automatically?
How does it feed corrective action, kaizen, or management review?
If this element is removed, can the system still operate without losing control, traceability, or KPI coverage?
What real-world exception scenarios can hit this element, and how are they blocked, corrected, or reversed?
If someone must override the normal path, how is authority, reason, evidence, and follow-up governed?
If the action is duplicated, delayed, backdated, retried, or partially completed, what is the deterministic recovery model?

technology_baseline.idempotency: Idempotency-Key on create and side-effect actions

operational_exception_questions: What happens on over receipt, under receipt, correction, return, and ASN mismatch?
What happens on quarantine hold, release, waiver, or recall?
What happens on duplicate submit, retry, offline replay, or delayed sync?
What happens on expired permit, expired calibration, expired training, or blocked asset?
What happens on period close, backdated posting, duplicate invoice, or failed match?
What happens on rework, concession, deviation, or engineering change after release?
What happens on negative inventory, UOM mismatch, or backflush variance?
What happens on shift handover, scheduler outage, or stuck escalation job?

core_value_stream.description: Directly controls customer, supplier, planning, production, inventory, quality, logistics, maintenance, EHS, or finance value streams.

governed_support.description: Supports traceability, collaboration, analytics, approvals, document evidence, or master governance for the core streams.

conditional_extension.description: Optional capability with bounded business value, retained only if linked to a defined owner and KPI or regulatory need.

unused_candidate.description: No clear value-stream role, weak workflow coverage, or blocked adoption footprint.

archive_isolation.description: Retained for evidence or rollback only, removed from active composition surfaces.

lean_and_kpi: NIST MEP lean and process improvement
Lean Enterprise Institute standard work and pull-flow disciplines
auditability: EU Annex 11 principles already declared by platform policy
